text.text: You can obtain certain liquids by melting trapped entities in an active smeltery. Here are a few liquids you can try out:
Melt down most entities or rotten flesh.
Melt down emeralds or villagers (illagers included).
Melt down slimes or find some in slime islands. This liquid functions as a slime spawner and comes in various colors.
Melt down blazes. This liquid is also used as a stronger fuel source in comparison to lava.
